case_title: GREGORY ISHENGOMA VS. CHANDRASINH D. PARMAR et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-28-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PARMAR, RAMILABEN C. DBA KEAN HOTEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-09-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-09-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. JAMES ADAMS PRESENT ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANTS, THE OWNERS OF THE KEAN HOTEL, AND STATE TO THE COURT THAT THE DEFENDANTS ARE IN INDIA. CLERK: S. VATREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ISHENGOMA, GREGORY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PARMAR, CHANDRASINH D. DBA KEAN HOTEL PARMAR, RAMILABEN C. DBA KEAN HOTEL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
